name: ASAbilitySpec
description: [ASAbilitySpec] represents an unlocked ability. It stores runtime state and provides methods to query execution data like cooldowns and costs.

methods.name: add_sub_spec
methods.description: Adds a sub-ability spec to this parent spec's lifecycle.

methods.name: get_ability
methods.description: Returns the ability resource.

methods.name: get_active_effects
methods.description: Returns all active effect instances created and managed by this specific ability execution.

methods.name: get_cooldown_duration
methods.description: Returns the base cooldown duration defined in the ability.

methods.name: get_cooldown_remaining
methods.description: Returns the time remaining for the cooldown on the owner ASC.

methods.name: get_cost_amount
methods.description: Returns the cost for a specific attribute.

methods.name: get_current_phase_index
methods.description: Returns the index of the currently active phase.

methods.name: get_duration_remaining
methods.description: Returns the time remaining in seconds for the current phase or ability duration.

methods.name: get_effects_for_target
methods.description: Returns effects filtered by their target type ([constant ASEffect.TARGET_SELF] or [constant ASEffect.TARGET_OTHERS]).

methods.name: get_is_active
methods.description: Returns true if the ability is currently running.

methods.name: get_level
methods.description: Returns the level of this instance.

methods.name: get_owner
methods.description: Returns the component that owns this spec.

methods.name: get_sub_specs
methods.description: Returns the list of active sub-specs (phases or sub-abilities) managed by this spec.

methods.name: get_total_duration
methods.description: Returns the initial total duration of the ability instance as calculated at activation.

methods.name: init
methods.description: Initializes the spec.

methods.name: is_on_cooldown
methods.description: Returns true if the ability tag is currently on cooldown.

methods.name: remove_sub_spec
methods.description: Removes a sub-ability spec.

methods.name: set_duration_remaining
methods.description: Manually modifies the remaining duration. Can be used for duration extensions or reductions.

methods.name: set_is_active
methods.description: Sets the active state.

methods.name: set_level
methods.description: Sets the instance level.

methods.name: set_total_duration
methods.description: Sets the total expected duration for this instance. This value is used as the reference for progress calculations.

methods.name: tick
methods.description: Advances the internal timers of the spec. Returns true if the duration has expired or the ability logic has signaled completion.
